libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Retain or add JVM test args and native-image build args: --add-opens=java.base/java.util=ALL-UNNAMED. This is needed for tests that exercise shaded.parquet.com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.util.ClassUtil.findEnumType on EnumSet or EnumMap; without it JDK module access fails with InaccessibleObjectException.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8256 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.parquet:parquet-jackson:1.16.0; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Do not add normal com.fasterxml.jackson dependencies unless a test explicitly targets an optional module; parquet-jackson embeds relocated Jackson classes and its published POM removes runtime Jackson dependencies.
The reported failure is an assertion/behavior drift in existing tests, not evidence of a missing Docker image or extra dependency.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: The artifact is a self-contained shaded Jackson jar with no runtime Maven dependencies or external services, but meaningful coverage of Jackson ClassUtil enum handling requires opening java.util on modern JDKs.
